summary: Replaced all raw shell commands in run-e2e-tests SKILL.md with just commands: merged npm install + playwright install into just e2e-setup, collapsed three npx tsx spec commands into just test-e2e --feature <slug>, and updated error table entries accordingly.
keyDecisions: Three separate npx tsx spec commands collapsed into one just test-e2e --feature <slug> call with combined tee output
Both npm install and playwright install error table entries replaced with just e2e-setup
